headline: Trump 🍊👑 CRASHES SCOTUS Birthright BITCH SLAP 💥🍼🚫
text:
President Daddy Trump 🍊🦅 is SLIDING into the Supreme Court 🏛️⚖️ WEDNESDAY 🔥📅 like a BOSS to YEET 🚫 birthright citizenship for ANCHOR BABIES 🍼🇲🇽 of ILLEGAL INVADERS 💀🛸! Day ONE back in the Oval Oval Office 🏠🇺🇸, he DROPPED that EXEC ORDER 💣📜 axing automatic citizenship for spawn of undocumented randos or temp visa simps 😤🚫 – 'I'm GOING,' Trump TOLD reporters, 'cuz I've HEARD this BS ARGUMENT FOREVER' 😂👂! First sitting POTUS to POP UP at oral args 🎤🍆 – that's how THICC 🍑 this IMMIGRATION CRACKDOWN is, cornerstone of Trump 2.0 AGENDA 🦅🔥!

Libs & ACLU cucks 🤡🆘 + 12 STATES + 5 PREGGO MOMMIES 🤰🚫 SUED FAST AF ⚡ claiming 14th AMENDMENT 🗽📜 (post-Civil War SLAVE BABY 🖤🍼 fix) says EVERYONE BORN HERE = CITIZEN, even if parents are JURISD-I-LLEGAL 😏! Trump team? 'NATIONAL SECURITY THREAT' 🛡️💥 from BIRTH TOURISM 🛫🍼 – foreigners FLY IN, POP OUT kiddo, DIP OUT laughing while WORLD SELLS US CITIZENSHIP like CHEAP TACOS 🌮💸! Trump TRUTH SOCIAL RANT 📱😂: 'World GETTING RICH off our STUPID courts (TARIFFS INCOMING 💰🛑) – 14th was for SLAVE BABIES ONLY!' 🔥🍊

Fed judges BLOCKED it with NATIONWIDE INJUNCTIONS 🛑📜 but SCOTUS 6-3 'GIANT WIN' 🏆 last summer SAID LOWER JUDGES CAN'T COCKBLOCK PREZ POWER 😤👊! Now Trump v. Barbara 🥊📛 (ACLU for ALL AFFECTED BABIES 🍼👶) hits the BIG LEAGUE – does 'SUBJECT TO JURISDICTION' 👮‍♂️ exclude ILLEGALS? ACLU: 'Fundamental to MERICA 🇺🇸❤️!' Trump: 'Nah, only PERMANENT/LAWFUL peeps!' Puns on jurisdiction? It's a JURIS-DICK-SHUN 🚫🍆 of birthright for invaders!

Summer DECISION LOOMS ☀️⚖️ testing 6 CONSERVATIVE DADDIES 🦅 vs 3 LIB SIMPS 🤢 on Trump IMMO POLICIES & PREZ POWER FLEX 💪! Legal eggheads 🤓 say NOPE, can't EO a CONSTITUTIONAL CHANGE 📜🚫 – but Jensen... er, Trump’s got that MAGIC WALL ENERGY 🧱🔥! Opponents SWEATING 😰💦 like birth tourists dodging ICE ❄️🚔, while MAGA CHADS cheer 'END THE ANCHOR BABY GRIFT 🍼💸!' If Trump SHOWS, it's HISTORIC MIC DROP 🎤💥 – birthright BUBBLE POPPING like NVDA but for borders 📈🛑! World laughing? Not after TARIFFS SLAP 'em 🤑🛑 – Trump fixing STUPID SYSTEM one ORDER at a time 🚀🇺🇸! ‼️🍑🔥
